description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a complex, dark gabled roof. The front features a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, flanked by bay windows and decorative columns. The property is enclosed by a low white fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and additional greenery, as well as a visible garage. Multiple large windows are symmetrically arranged across both floors, providing ample natural light. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a dark gabled roof, prominent entryway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a white fence and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, covered porch, bay windows, and decorative columns.
description_view_1: Side/rear angle highlighting the fenced yard, trees, and partial view of the backyard amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, large windows, and garage access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, more trees, and the pool area from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, decorative columns, and flanking bay windows
